scripts.dev: sh -ac 'set -a; if [ -f .env.local ]; then . ./.env.local; elif [ -f ../../.env.local ]; then . ../../.env.local; fi; set +a; next dev'
scripts.build: sh -ac 'set -a; if [ -f .env.local ]; then . ./.env.local; elif [ -f ../../.env.local ]; then . ../../.env.local; fi; set +a; next build'
scripts.start: sh -ac 'set -a; if [ -f .env.local ]; then . ./.env.local; elif [ -f ../../.env.local ]; then . ../../.env.local; fi; set +a; next start'
